title: Colon Three
description: A modpack for the Colon Three Server! :3
body:
A selection of mods for the Coolie Channel group focusing on Quality of Life and Vanilla+ gameplay.

This modpack has been published to Modrinth for an easier expierence for everyone, which means no more changing controls everytime a new version is published.

IF YOU ARE UNABLE TO JOIN THE SERVER, UPDATE THIS MODPACK FIRST!

Uses Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
